title: Baby Squid Chowder
description: A hearty and flavorful seafood chowder featuring baby squid and a hint of Canadian spices.

ingredients.name: Baby squid
ingredients.amount: 1 pound, cleaned and cut into bite-sized pieces

instructions: Heat butter in a large pot over medium heat.
Add diced onion and cook until softened, about 5 minutes.
Add minced garlic and cook for an additional 1-2 minutes.
Add diced Canadian bacon and cook until lightly browned, about 3-4 minutes.
Add diced potatoes and cook for 5 minutes, stirring occasionally.
Add clam juice, milk, and baby squid. Stir to combine.
Bring the mixture to a simmer, then reduce heat to low and cook, covered, for 10-12 minutes or until the squid is cooked through.
Season with salt and pepper to taste.
Serve hot, garnished with chopped parsley if desired.
